reviews.comment:
Como en la mayoría de las YPF del ACA, se encuentra el mejor servicio.
Un placer parar a descansar en su amplia arboleda con bancos, mesas y fogones.
Sanitarios muy limpios.
Un Shop, que parece un minimarket, con variedad de productos, muchos regionales.
Parrilla y restaurante.
Un lugar donde siempre se vuelve después de conocerlo!

(Translated by Google)
As with most ACA YPF stations, you'll find excellent service.
It's a pleasure to stop and relax in its spacious grove with benches, tables, and fire pits.
The restrooms are very clean.
There's a shop, which resembles a minimarket, with a variety of products, many of them regional.
There's also a grill and a restaurant.
A place you'll always want to return to after visiting!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHcS1xTFRBEAE

reviews.comment:
